{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230258340AABD45550ED417ECE25"}"},"total":249103},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7309442827376788260","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好好！非常甜的一本书，我超喜欢书里主角的兄弟情，非常感动，强烈推荐大家去看，文笔也超级棒的，作者是甜文高手我从不骗人…天杀的作者老子要报官抓你！！！！[哭]","text_exts":[{"e":24,"s":21,"text":"兄弟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774205914417ECE25%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227309442827376788260%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227276384138653862966%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%84%E5%BC%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701863924,"group_id":"7276384138653862966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"下一本收藏什么类型的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7r8NzDWLNJyEpKxGj2aViAd0I+cy34Tk2iGN06w+UEc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8cd63b46d5454dbfa856472f6e6ebf79~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794828&x-signature=OvQiY1zA7Hbes8CuOxYl1W941u4%3D","user_id":"1473788534335591","user_name":"七彩阳光紫薯包"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1473788534335591","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276384138653862966","book_info":{"abstract":"《斩神》作家三九音域全新力作  | 澳门国际科幻奖最佳科幻网络文学 | 逆转时代的中式怪诞巨作
赤色流星划过天际后，人类文明陷入停滞。
从那天起，人们再也无法制造一枚火箭，一颗核弹，一架飞机，一台汽车……近代科学堆砌而成的文明金字塔轰然坍塌，而灾难，远不止此。
灰色的世界随着赤色流星降临，像是镜面后的鬼魅倒影，将文明世界一点点拖入无序的深渊。
在这个时代，人命渺如尘埃；
在这个时代，人类灿若星辰。
大厦将倾，有人见一戏子屹立文明废墟之上，红帔似血，时笑时哭，
时代的帘幕在他身后缓缓打开，他张开双臂，对着累累众生轻声低语——
“好戏……开场。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cdc1c766d5348269a18bcf7e71d7e707","author":"三九音域","author_id":"","book_id":"7276384138653862966","book_name":"我不是戏神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"375.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7276663560427471412","read_count":"3754996","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3873497"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.9","serial_count":"1868","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o99ffbfd13492eb9953715959db26ed9b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389914&x-signature=a4sL5EyohZjnEgEf2d5wUCTAKQ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104957777655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.609211e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230258340AABD45550ED417ECE25"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1848,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3609,"reply_count":133,"show_pv":491843},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7532454577885266713","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"攒了好久又回来重新看了，我觉得39的进步真的很大，特别是人物刻画方面，每一个角色都有自己独特的魅力，感觉每个人都好可爱[爱慕]
